manual.check: Every Acceptance Criterion is verified, with evidence cited in the completion summary (not just 'done').
Local validation passes — lint, type-check, tests (project's standard set).

Landing checks pass for the path used — PR path: all required CI checks green on the merged commit; direct-commit path (no-CI repo / meta-tooling): the project's local validation set is green, output cited (the other path is N/A by construction).
The change has LANDED on the base branch (not 'looks done') — PR path: PR merged; direct-commit path: committed to the base branch AND deployment confirmed (e.g. synced / symlinked).
The original symptom is gone, verified via the source artifact (re-test / re-run scanner) — not merely 'PR merged'.
If the fix has 3+ sibling occurrences: all swept + forward guard installed, OR a deferred sweep is documented (tracked WI, owner, target, remaining sites).
User-facing docs touched (if behavior changed) AND AC verified by a user-shaped check, not only unit tests.

verdict.failOpenWarning: CI gate FAILED OPEN: required checks unreadable — could not resolve the default branch for cognoco/eduagent-build via gh; close allowed under advisory-safe policy.

ci_gate.reason: CI gate FAILED OPEN: required checks unreadable — could not resolve the default branch for cognoco/eduagent-build via gh; close allowed under advisory-safe policy.
